corpus_construction_rules.unavailable_text_policy: Known failed-fetch excerpts, AIM paywalled excerpts, and stubs in inputs.jsonl are replaced with clean summary excerpts based on local NML source or analogue material; source/provenance prefixes are not included in model-facing body_excerpt text.
corpus_construction_rules.text_policy: compact article cards only; full article text is not a default model input

all_distractors.purpose: Returned ids that are all in the irrelevant bucket should score low precision.

missing_critical_id.purpose: A run that otherwise clears numeric thresholds fails when any critical_miss_id is absent.

perfect_output.output_policy: Return exactly must_find plus nice_to_have ids.

metric_definitions.borderline_policy: borderline ids are neutral by default: they do not count as relevant for precision and are not required for recall
metric_definitions.case_pass: recall >= target_thresholds.recall and precision >= target_thresholds.precision and no critical miss is missing
metric_definitions.critical_miss_policy: if any id in critical_miss_ids is absent from returned ids, the case fails regardless of recall and precision
metric_definitions.overall_pass: all included cases must pass; averaging across cases is not sufficient
metric_definitions.precision: count(returned ids in must_find + nice_to_have) / count(returned ids excluding borderline ids)

private_source_documents: Private DOCX contents are not committed; only derived request formulations are stored in benchmark artifacts.
review_notes: See agent_qa_review_notes.json for RD7 agent-side QA. Final project-team expert adjudication remains pending.
